name: Bread

ingredients.item: of tomatoes, 2 slices of cucumber, salad greens, and arugula to taste, a few pieces of dehydrated red pepper, and a thin layer of dehydrated shallots. Top it all off with a thin layer of sunflower seed paste (see p.61), and then cover with the second piece of bread. For a sandwich that not only tastes delicious but also looks delicious, cut the sandwich on the diagonal with a serrated knife.
lemon juice pinch of sea salt

method: Makes 1 large jar • Preparation time: 15 minutes plus soaking
Soak the mustard seeds overnight in cold water.
Drain them just before using.
Place all the ingredients into a blender or food processor. Add
⁄4 cup of water. Process on the highest setting for 5 minutes.
⁄3 cups dried tomatoes
2 cups sunflower seeds
4 tbsp cold-pressed olive oil
1 tsp dried Herbes de Provence
⁄4 tsp cayenne pepper salt and ground black pepper
⁄4 cup lemon juice
⁄2–1 cucumber (depending on the consistency desired)
⁄3 cups dried tomatoes
1lb (450g) tomatoes
4 tbsp cold-pressed olive oil
2 tbsp apple vinegar
4 sprigs flat-leaf parsley or basil sea salt and ground black pepper
Makes 1 large jar • Preparation time: 20 minutes plus soaking
Makes 1 large jar • Preparation time: 15 minutes plus soaking
Makes 16fl oz (500ml) • Preparation time: 20 minutes plus soaking
Soak the tomatoes and the sunflower seeds overnight in cold water. Drain them just before using.
Place all the ingredients into a blender or food processor. Purée on the highest setting for 5 minutes.
Soak the cashews overnight in cold water. Drain them just before using. Peel the garlic and put it through a garlic press.
Place all the ingredients, except for the cucumber, into a blender.
Purée on the highest setting for 5 minutes. If needed, you can add a bit of water to make the mixture creamier.
Slice the cucumber lengthwise in half. Using a spoon, scrape out the seeds. Grate the cucumber finely, and stir it into the sauce.

Soak the dried tomatoes overnight in cold water. Drain them just before using. Remove the stems from the fresh tomatoes and cut them in half or quarters. Remove the stem from the red pepper, seed it, and cut out the pith. Peel the garlic, and pit the dates.
Place all the ingredients, except for the herbs and seasoning, into a blender or food processor. Purée on the highest setting for
5 minutes. Pick the herb leaves, chop them finely, and stir them into the sauce. Season with sea salt and pepper.
Sunflower seed sauce
